title: Aesthetics
description: Add toggleable falling leaves and Fireflies to your Minecraft world.
body:
The Perfect Ambience Addition!
The Aesthetics Datapack adds falling leaves and fireflies to your game.

Leaves fall often when you're around trees. Fireflies spawn semi-frequently in grassy areas early in the night (time 13500-19000).

Commands:
/trigger amr.aesthetics.toggle.leaves - Toggle Falling Leaves On And Off
/trigger amr.aesthetics.toggle.fireflies - Toggle Fireflies On And Off




Please note:
The toggle commands only disable local spawns (around the player executing the commands).



Credits:
Original Falling leaves/firefly mechanism designed by Samasaurus6. I re-did the mechanics for higher versions and optimized it for minimal lag.
